name: JPGLabs [GitOps] - GitLab Tag & Version Sync
description: Auto-tags releases with CalVer (vYYYY.MM.DD.N) when a MR is merged to main on GitLab. Creates matching tag on GitHub, creates GitLab release with auto-generated changelog, and notifies Slack. Standalone workflow for on-demand tagging outside the CI pipeline flow.

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ tag_name: $('Calculate CalVer').first().json.new_tag, name: 'Release ' + $('Calculate CalVer').first().json.new_tag, description: '## ' + $('Calculate CalVer').first().json.new_tag + '

**MR:** !' + $('Calculate CalVer').first().json.mr_iid + ' - ' + $('Calculate CalVer').first().json.mr_title + '
**Branch:** ' + $('Calculate CalVer').first().json.source_branch + ' -> main
**Author:** ' + $('Calculate CalVer').first().json.author + '
**Commit:** ' + $('Calculate CalVer').first().json.commit_short + '

---
_Auto-generated by n8n GitOps workflow_' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ text: '[GitOps] New Release Tagged
Project: ' + $('Calculate CalVer').first().json.project_name + '
Tag: ' + $('Calculate CalVer').first().json.new_tag + '
MR: !' + $('Calculate CalVer').first().json.mr_iid + ' - ' + $('Calculate CalVer').first().json.mr_title + '
Author: ' + $('Calculate CalVer').first().json.author + '
Commit: ' + $('Calculate CalVer').first().json.commit_short + '
GitLab tag + release created
GitHub tag synced' }) }}
